items.final_wording: Supports documenting the dural-puncture context, headache timing and features, associated symptoms, focused history and examination, and atypical or severe neurological features without automatically diagnosing PDPH.

source.title: Statement on Post-Dural Puncture Headache Management
source.population: Predominantly obstetric patients with recognised or suspected unintentional dural puncture or post-dural puncture headache.
source.setting: Neuraxial anesthesia follow-up, postpartum assessment, discharge, and post-discharge follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for documented headache history, focused examination, atypical or severe features, and follow-up after suspected or confirmed dural puncture. It is only partial for a broad non-obstetric post-spinal-headache workflow, and treatment recommendations are not mapped.

exact_location.heading: PDPH Definition and PDPH Diagnosis
exact_location.locator: official statement, PDPH Definition and PDPH Diagnosis paragraphs
